name: Christina Zhu
title: Developer Relations Engineer @ Google Cloud AI
bio:
Hi, I'm Christina! I'm a software engineer, developer advocate, and tech enthusiast with interests ranging from gaming and business to design. Currently, I'm a Developer Relations Engineer on Cloud AI at Google.

I focus on helping developers build apps. My work sits right at the intersection of engineering and community, where I take complex concepts and make them accessible for everyone to use. I love teaching!

I've worked in both engineering and developer relations across different companies including Anyscale, Square, Amazon, Retool, and Visier. I've built software, led developer community growth, and created technical content that helps people ship code. Hope to work with you soon — reach out anytime!
contact: Hope to work with you soon!
